_label_note: AUTO-LABELED by LLM. Spot-check before refreshing recall.lock.json. Lock updates must include this provenance in --reason per item 16.
_label_tier_note: AU Stage B cleanup: must_detect is the strict detector-aligned benchmark tier; ideal_must_detect preserves broader auto-labeled statutory coverage for gap discovery. Pending labels still require project-owner approval before promotion-ready status.

_strict_reconciliation.basis: AU Stage B auto-label strict tier was reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine findings; original auto-label breadth is preserved in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. This is internal benchmark cleanup, not legal advice or procurement-grade review.
_strict_reconciliation.strict_source: PreSendReviewEngine.review(..., review_profile='strict') after AU Stage B precision guards

ideal_must_detect.matched_text: non‑public, issuer‑material information reasonably expected to affect Quarrystone’s securities
no selective briefings—any deck for Investor meetings must first be released on the ASX Platform
wall‑crossing consents required for any additional potential investors
blackout applies from quarter end until release of Appendix 4C and from 1 July until FY results
breach of minimum cash covenant (A$4.0m) is considered material for Listing Rule 3.1 purposes
if leak risk arises, the Company will request a trading halt
closed periods under the Company’s Securities Trading Policy
materials in the data room must be returned or destroyed upon request

Issuer‑relative materiality: Covenants and forecast thresholds are assessed against Quarrystone’s current market capitalisation and liquidity profile; breach of minimum cash covenant (A$4.0m) is considered material for Listing Rule 3.1 purposes.

Events of default and remedies: Non‑payment (10 business day cure), insolvency, continuous disclosure breach not rectified within 5 business days, or delisting; upon EoD, Investor may require immediate redemption at 105% of outstanding principal plus accrued interest.
